projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: A fully responsive portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Features dark mode toggle, scroll reveal, form validation, and JSON data integration.

projects.title: Student Grade Tracker
projects.description: A web-based grade tracking system where students can input their grades, compute their GWA, and visualize performance per subject using dynamic tables.

projects.title: Library Management System
projects.description: A simple library management system with book inventory, borrowing records, and user management. Built using PHP and MySQL with a responsive front-end.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.description: A weather application that fetches real-time weather data using a public API. Displays temperature, humidity, and weather conditions for any searched city.
